draw.io / diagrams.net viewer (vendored)

File:    viewer-static.min.js
Version: v30.3.14 (jgraph/drawio GitHub tag)
Source:  https://github.com/jgraph/drawio/blob/v30.3.14/src/main/webapp/js/viewer-static.min.js
License: Apache License 2.0 (see LICENSE in this folder)

Do not load this script from viewer.diagrams.net or any other CDN at runtime.
Before loading the script, clear the viewer's default remote URL settings
(PROXY_URL, STYLE_PATH, STENCIL_PATH, etc.) so it does not contact draw.io servers.
